meaning: n.闍ｱ蝗ｽ蝗ｽ謨吝ｾ誕dj.闍ｱ蝗ｽ蝗ｽ謨咏噪
examples: He advocated the disestablishment of the Anglican church.
In charge of each will be a former Anglican prelate.
The old Anglican prejudice against Catholics has been replaced by the secular sort.
The long decline in Anglican churchgoing is levelling off, the Church of England has said.
Ms Clarke said more than 50% of the island's Anglican churches now use Fairtrade products.
